name: Garage Project Ponderosa Pale
description: An American classic, with a twist of pine. Ponderosa Pale – American Pale Ale. Sweet malts blended with Oregon Chinook, Cascade, Citra and Strata and finished with a shot of pine terpene. White grapefruit citrus, dank pineapple sativa and sun warmed old growth resin, all balanced with chewy caramel biscuit malt. Like Oregon old growth in a can. – Garage Project

name: One Drop Right Back To Me Double Fruited Smoothie Sour
description: Bring it right back to me weaves sun-warmed Aussie blueberries, ripe mango and deep blackcurrant into a luxuriously thick smoothie. A gentle ribbon of vanilla cream softens the vibrant fruit tang into a velvety, frui-punching-like finish that lingers just long enough to tickle the nice part of your brain. Quietly indulgent and effortlessly balanced, it’s all dessert-style decadence without any of the fuss y’all. Circle back one of these into your head hole! – One Drop

name: 2024 Lucy M Cidre
description: Apples, Pears and Quinces “ménage à trois” of curves fold intimately sweet apple red, firm, excitable over textured pear green curves the sublet perfumed awkward quinces makes a perfect marriage in the summer glowing bubbles. Freedom! Libration! let the trumpets blow! Cidre! – Lucy M

name: Sopra Chino Chinotto Seltzer
description: Indulge your dark side. Our take on the classic Italian soda. Bitter, sweet, citrus and herbs, perfectly refreshing. – Sopra

name: Maidenii Sweet Vermouth
description: Designed with the classic Negroni in mind. Build equal parts Maidenii Sweet Vermouth, Campari and a gin of your choosing over ice in a rocks glass. Garnish with an orange twist. A base of Cabernet Sauvignon with Strawberry gum, wattle seed, river mint, sea parsley, grapefruit zest, mace, angelica root. – Maidenii

name: Saison Aperitifs Spring Rhubarb Vermouth
description: Two different farmers (both named Jo) grow the aforementioned rhubarb, which brings a pink and vibrant punch to this spring-loaded release. It’s infused fresh into a moscato base wine, along with magnolia, lavender, and violet blossoms. It’s then bittered using two Australian wormwoods and aged resting on even more rhubarb, roasted this time, and fresh lilac flowers. The infusions of raw rhubarb bring a bright sourness, while the cooked stalks bring that sweet and comforting familiarity. We grew up on mum’s stewed rhubarb. This is that, just with booze. – Saison Aperitifs

name: Michters x Mr West Whiskey Degustation w/ Chef Caitlin Koether
description: Join us at Mr West this July to celebrate Whisk(e)y Month and embark on a captivating journey into the world of fine spirits. Immerse yourself in the rich tapestry of whisk(e)y as we explore its diverse flavours and fascinating heritage. Each week, we’ll shine a spotlight on a different facet of whisky production, showcasing local malts, heritage American distilleries, booming Irish producers, and the esoteric world of Scottish Independent bottlers. Our grand finale will feature an exquisite five-course degustation, highlighting the renowned Michters distillery. At Mr West, we have curated an exceptional selection of beverages that epitomize outstanding quality and represent the pinnacle of their respective styles. The drinks have been expertly paired with Chef Caitlin’s culinary creations. Indulge in a delightful lunch consisting of five courses, each perfectly complemented by a carefully selected beverage. Join us on Sunday, July 30th, at 1pm for a culinary journey inspired by the world of Michters. Chef, Caitlin Koether, brings her renowned expertise in food preservation and fermentation to the table. With a decade of global experience, Caitlin has made her mark at esteemed establishments such as Bar Tartine and Tartine Manufactory in San Francisco and Relae in Copenhagen. Currently based in Melbourne, Caitlin has captivated food enthusiasts with her innovative pop-up events, sparking engaging discussions on the art of food fermentation. Her passion lies in exploring the intricate connection between preservation, food science, and flavour, all while prioritizing waste management and sustainability. Through her imaginative menus, Caitlin creates a delightful culinary experience that combines knowledge and enjoyment. We can accommodate vegan, vegetarian, dairy-free and nut allergies but cannot accommodate for gluten-free and any sort of no onion/no garlic dietaries. Please put any dietaries in the notes section at checkout or email us at shop@mrwest.com.au

name: 2024 Pool Pheasant Shiraz
description: In our opinion this is as close as “natural” Shiraz can get to “fine wine”. No silly techniques here, made with extreme respect at every stage. Top quality organic fruit handpicked, gently processed and watched with careful eyes over a generous élevage in mature barrels to produce a wine with great weight with a plenty of length and fine tannins. Hands-off/eyes-on style. – Pool Wines

name: 2019 Le Coste Pizzicante Vino Frizzante Rosato
description: This vibrant sparkling rosato is made from Aleatico, destemmed and fermented on the skins for just a few hours before being pressed off to vats and then bottle to finish fermentation. It was disgorged after two years on the lees, producing a wine of gorgeous colour and fine bubbles, which carry refreshing notes of blood orange, pink peppercorn and rose. – Supplier’s Notes

name: Hop Nation Summer Series Mimosa Sour
description: Inspired by the classic mimosa, this sour uses Australian pale, wheat, and oats to create a smooth base, then is soured twice for maximum tang. Packed with fresh Australian Navel orange juice, it delivers a bold, zesty burst of citrus — a turbo-charged OJ experience. – Hop Nation

name: 2024 Pool Wines Beach Leech
description: A funk fuelled Marsanne perfect for the freaks that love to drink white wine through winter. Savoury and super textural with hints of honey suckle and pickled apricots. – Pool Wines

name: Mr West Online Voucher
description: Give the gift of booze! Spoil your nearest and dearest with a Mr West gift voucher. Note: Gift vouchers are redeemable online only.

name: Drivers Non-Alc Lager
description: Drivers Non-Alcoholic Lager is a refreshing, full-flavoured beer brewed for smooth drinking and smooth driving. Started by four friends and an ’89 Saab Turbo that sometimes starts, Drivers was brewed so people would never have to choose between a delicious lager and the car they love ever again. It’s the one for the road. Enjoy ice cold. – Drivers Beer

name: Beesbucha Banana
description: Unlike typical kombucha, Beesbucha is a “mead”—a drink made from fermented honey. We combine pure Beechworth Honey with natural ingredients like bananas, raspberries, and Australian Kensington Pride mangoes to create a delightful, effervescent beverage. Our drinks are unpasteurised, unfiltered, and free from preservatives, artificial flavors, or sweeteners, ensuring a 100% natural experience. Ingredients: No artificial flavours, preservatives or sweeteners. Just water, Beechworth Honey and Banana. 100% natural, unfiltered, unpasteurized, no preservative, no artificial flavour or sweetener. – Beesbucha

name: Beesbucha Mango
description: Unlike typical kombucha, Beesbucha is a “mead”—a drink made from fermented honey. We combine pure Beechworth Honey with natural ingredients like bananas, raspberries, and Australian Kensington Pride mangoes to create a delightful, effervescent beverage. Our drinks are unpasteurised, unfiltered, and free from preservatives, artificial flavors, or sweeteners, ensuring a 100% natural experience. Ingredients: No artificial flavours, preservatives or sweeteners. Just water, Beechworth Honey and Australian Kensington Pride Mangos. 100% natural, unfiltered, unpasteurized, no preservative, no artificial flavour or sweetener.

name: Beesbucha Raspberry
description: Unlike typical kombucha, Beesbucha is a “mead”—a drink made from fermented honey. We combine pure Beechworth Honey with natural ingredients like bananas, raspberries, and Australian Kensington Pride mangoes to create a delightful, effervescent beverage. Our drinks are unpasteurised, unfiltered, and free from preservatives, artificial flavors, or sweeteners, ensuring a 100% natural experience. Ingredients: No artificial flavours, preservatives or sweeteners. Just water, Beechworth Honey, raspberries and wild eucalyptus radiata, native from South Eastern Australia. 100% natural, unfiltered, unpasteurized, no preservative, no artificial flavour or sweetener. – Beesbucha

name: Hop Nation Passing Storm Non-Alc WCIPA
description: Our friends down at Hop Nation Brewing Co in Footscray have delivered another designated driver friendly beer with Passing Storm. Crafted in classic West Coast IPA style this Alc-Free version is double dry hopped with a blend of Simcoe, Citra and Centennial hops.

name: NV Dr Loosen Dr Lo Alcohol Free Riesling
description: Dr Loosen has been in the same family for more than 200 years and its present guardian, Ernst Loosen, is one of the great characters of the wine world. He assumed ownership of the estate in 1988 and immediately realised that, with ungrafted vines averaging 60 years old in some of Germany’s best-rated vineyards, he had the raw materials to create stunningly intense, world-class wines. To achieve this, Erni dramatically reduced his crop size and ceased using chemical fertilisers, preferring only moderate use of organic fertilisers. And, most importantly, he turned to gentler cellar practices that allow the wine to develop to its full potential with a minimum of handling and technological meddling. 100% Mosel Riesling produced in stainless steel tanks. During fermentation the tank was chilled to help stop the fermentation process early and preserve the natural sugar. The alcohol was then removed during a vacuum distillation. DR. LO Riesling has just the right amount of fruitiness to balance the crisp acidity. On the palate it is clearly Riesling, but it walks the line between a fruity and drier style. The characteristic acidity of Mosel Riesling helps it finish fresh and clean.

name: Range Low Key Non Alc Pale
description: Low Key is a Non Alcohol Pale Ale and our first foray into the Non Alc space. We’ve loaded this Pale up with Citra hops and a touch of Pineapple and Mango. It pours a beautiful light yellowy-golden haze. Pineapple daiquiri, pink starburst and candied mango dominate the aromas, with notes of fleshy orange, lime and pineapple. Beautifully refreshing and incredibly moreish. All flavour, no hangover.

name: Garage Project Tiny Non-Alcoholic Hazy IPA
description: Say hi to Tiny: Brewed with pilsner malt, golden naked oats, Mosaic, Strata and Simcoe, Tiny is specially fermented to give you all the big, juicy hop character you’ve come to expect from a Hazy IPA – just without the alcohol. Yup that’s right. Big flavour, without the booze so you can enjoy your hazy anytime. Tiny, but mighty.- Notes from Garage Project

name: Gurneys Zero Non-Alc Cider
description: No description available
